message:
fix: restrict RBAC/user-management endpoints to admin role (#5472)

Add admin role authorization checks to 7 endpoints that previously
allowed any authenticated user to access sensitive RBAC information:

- GetUserManagementSummary (#5459)
- ListK8sRoles (#5460)
- ListK8sRoleBindings (#5461)
- ListK8sUsers (#5462)
- ListOpenShiftUsers (#5463)
- GetPermissionsSummary (#5465)
- GetNamespaceAccess (#5466)

Each endpoint now verifies the requesting user has admin role before
proceeding, returning 403 Forbidden with a security warning log for
non-admin attempts. Follows the same pattern established in
ListConsoleUsers (PR #5464).

Fixes #5459, Fixes #5460, Fixes #5461, Fixes #5462, Fixes #5463,
Fixes #5465, Fixes #5466

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
